data.content:
Plan review approved

The plan is complete, correct, and feasible. It identifies the likely regression in src/components/stale-beat-grooming-dialog.tsx: DialogTrigger asChild injects trigger props into StaleBeatDialogTrigger, but the extracted component drops them instead of forwarding/spreading them to Button. That directly explains a visible Stale Beats button that no longer opens the dialog.

The implementation scope is appropriately small, preserves the recent dispatch-helper refactor, and the proposed validation targets the actual event-composition behavior that failed. No invariants, security, performance, or maintainability concerns found.
